step_1_notes.description: Protected zone length measured from column face

step_1_notes.requirement: La placa de extremo debe conectarse al ala de la columna.

step_1_notes.description: Altura derivada de placa de extremo
Geometria end-plate de viga a derecha
step_1_notes.requirement: h1_vgder, h2_vgder, h3_vgder, h4_vgder y dh_vgder para trazabilidad geometrica
step_1_notes.formula: h1=d-0.5tf+pso+pb; h2=d-0.5tf+pso; h3=d-1.5tf-psi; h4=d-1.5tf-psi-pb; dh=d+1/16 in (db<=7/8 in) else dh=d+1/8 in

step_1_notes.description: Altura derivada de placa de extremo
Geometria end-plate de viga a izquierda
step_1_notes.requirement: h1_vgizq, h2_vgizq, h3_vgizq, h4_vgizq y dh_vgizq para trazabilidad geometrica
step_1_notes.formula: h1=d-0.5tf+pso+pb; h2=d-0.5tf+pso; h3=d-1.5tf-psi; h4=d-1.5tf-psi-pb; dh=d+1/16 in (db<=7/8 in) else dh=d+1/8 in

step_1_notes.description: Derived end-plate stiffener geometry and detailing edge requirement
step_1_notes.formula: h_pest_vgder = pfo_pe_vgder + de_pe_vgder; L_pest_vgder = h_pest_vgder/tan(30 deg); Ed_pest_vgder = 25 mm

step_1_notes.description: Derived end-plate stiffener geometry and detailing edge requirement
step_1_notes.formula: h_pest_vgizq = pfo_pe_vgizq + de_pe_vgizq; L_pest_vgizq = h_pest_vgizq/tan(30 deg); Ed_pest_vgizq = 25 mm

step_1_notes.description: Requisitos de soldadura entre ala de viga y placa de extremo
step_1_notes.requirement: La unión entre el ala de la viga y la placa de extremo debe ejecutarse con una soldadura de ranura CJP sin respaldo. La soldadura de ranura CJP debe realizarse de modo que la raíz de la soldadura quede del lado del alma de la viga respecto del ala. La cara interior del ala debe tener una soldadura de filete de c in. (8 mm). Estas soldaduras deben ser de demanda crítica.

step_1_notes.description: Secuencia de soldadura para conexiones end-plate rigidizadas
step_1_notes.requirement: Para conexiones end-plate rigidizadas, la soldadura entre el ala de la viga y la placa de extremo debe ejecutarse antes de instalar el rigidizador.

step_1_notes.description: Excepcion de respaldo en la raiz cerca del alma de la viga
step_1_notes.requirement: No se requiere respaldo en la raiz del ala, directamente por encima y por debajo del alma de la viga, en una longitud igual a 1.5k1. En esa ubicacion se permite una soldadura de ranura PJP de profundidad completa.
Los requisitos de instalacion deben cumplir con las AISC Seismic Provisions y con la especificacion RCSC, salvo que este estandar indique lo contrario.

step_1_notes.description: Quality control and quality assurance for bolted assemblies
step_1_notes.requirement: El control de calidad y el aseguramiento de calidad deben cumplir con las AISC Seismic Provisions.

step_1_limits.description: Familia de perfil de viga permitida para precalificacion (viga izquierda)
Familia de perfil de viga permitida para precalificacion (viga derecha)
End-plate width vs beam flange width (left beam)
Length without shear connectors from column face (left beam)
Beam clearance criterion using Sc and S threshold (left beam)
step_1_limits.verification_text: Sc = St_col - pfo - pb; S = 0.5*sqrt(bcf*g); Sc_vgizq > S => 617.004 mm > 100.747 mm

step_1_limits.description: Clear span-to-depth ratio by frame system (left beam)

End-plate fit within column flange width
Proyeccion de columna minima por encima de las vigas

step_1_limits.description: Stiffener local buckling width-thickness limit (right beam)
Bolt gage clearance with stiffener thickness (right beam)

Bolt gage clearance with stiffener thickness (left beam)
End-plate to beam-web weld type shall be an allowed category
Continuity-plate weld type shall be explicitly declared with an allowed weld category
Continuity-plate weld type when plate thickness is less than or equal to 3/8 in (10 mm)
Bolt tightening type must be one recognized category
Bolts shall be pretensioned unless a specific connection permits otherwise
Bolt fabrication standard must be an allowed high-strength ASTM designation

pso_pe_vgizq (=pfo_pe_vgizq) >= emin; pfo_pe_vgizq <= 51 mm; pfo_pe_vgizq >= 41 mm

calculation_memory.equation: Step 1 PREQUALIFICATION LIMITS: compute each geometric value and compare directly against Table 6.1 limits using calculated vs limit checks (>= or <=, no DCR format).

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 2 probable maximum moment at plastic hinge
checks.clause: Chapter 6 / Section 6.7.1 Step 2 + Eq. (2.4-1) and Eq. (2.4-2)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 3 plastic hinge distance from column face
checks.clause: Chapter 6 / Section 6.7.1 Step 3 + Eq. (6.7-1) and Eq. (6.7-2)

calculation_memory.equation: Sh_vglado = min(d_vglado/2, 3*bf_vglado) [4E] o Sh_vglado = L_pest_vglado + tpe_vglado [4ES/8ES]

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 4 shear force at plastic hinge

calculation_memory.equation: Vhmax = 2*Mpr/Lh + Vgravity; Vhmin = 2*Mpr/Lh - Vgravity (Eq. 2.4-3, side-specific der/izq)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 5 probable maximum moment at face of column

calculation_memory.equation: Mfmax = Mpr + Vhmax*Sh; Mfmin = Mpr + Vhmin*Sh (Eq. 2.4-4, side-specific der/izq)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 12.1.1 column flange local bending (LFB)
bseep_8es Step 6.1 bolt tension rupture capacity

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_b_p+_vgizq = Mf_vgizq_critico/(2*(h1_pe_vgizq + h2_pe_vgizq + h3_pe_vgizq + h4_pe_vgizq)); phi*Rn_b_p+_vgizq = phi * Rn_b_p+_vgizq, Rn_b_p+_vgizq = A_b_vgizq * Fnt_b_vgizq, A_b_vgizq = pi*db^2/4 (AISC 360-22 J3.7)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 6.2 bolt shear rupture capacity

calculation_memory.equation: Ru_b_v2_vgizq = Vh_vgizq_critico/n_b_vgizq, phi*Rn_b_v2_vgizq = phi * Rn_b_v2_vgizq, Rn_b_v2_vgizq = A_b_vgizq * Fnv_b_vgizq, A_b_vgizq = pi*db^2/4, n_b_vgizq = 4 (4E/4ES) or 8 (8ES) (AISC 360-22 J3.7)
Ru_pe_m3_vgizq = Mf_vgizq_critico; phi*Rn_pe_m3_vgizq = phi * tpe_vgizq^2 * Fyp_pe_vgizq * Yp_pe_vgizq (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-8)
Rn_pe_v1_vgizq = Ru_pe_m3_vgizq / (2*(d_vgizq - tf_vgizq)); phi*Rn_pe_v1_vgizq = phi * 0.6 * Fyp_pe_vgizq * bpe_vgizq * tpe_vgizq (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-10)
Rn_pe_v2_vgizq = Ru_pe_m3_vgizq / (2*(d_vgizq - tf_vgizq)); phi*Rn_pe_v2_vgizq = phi * 0.6 * Fup_pe_vgizq * tpe_vgizq * (bpe_vgizq - 2*(dh_pe_vgizq + 1.6 mm)) (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-12)

lc_pe_vgizq = min(pb_pe_vgizq - dh_pe_vgizq, pfo_pe_vgizq + pfi_pe_vgizq + tf_vgizq - dh_pe_vgizq); Ru_pe_v2_vgizq = Vh_vgizq_critico / n_b_vgizq; phi*Rn_pe_v2_vgizq = phi * 1.2 * lc_pe_vgizq * tpe_vgizq * Fup_pe_vgizq (AISC 360-22 J3.11a)
Ru_pe_v2_vgizq = Vh_vgizq_critico / n_b_vgizq; phi*Rn_pe_v2_vgizq = phi * 2.4 * d_b_vgizq * tpe_vgizq * Fup_pe_vgizq (AISC 360-22 J3.11a)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 8.1.1 stiffener weld tension rupture

calculation_memory.equation: Fillet: Ru_w1_p+_vgizq = Fys_pest_vgizq * t_pest_vgizq * h_pest_vgizq; l_w1_vgizq = h_pest_vgizq - c_pest_vgizq - 2*w_w1_vgizq; phi*Rn_w1_p+_vgizq = phi * kds_w1_vgizq * nl_w1_vgizq * 0.6 * Fexx_w1_vgizq * 0.707 * l_w1_vgizq * w_w1_vgizq; DCR_w1_p+_vgizq = Ru_w1_p+_vgizq / phi*Rn_w1_p+_vgizq (AISC 360-22 J2.4)

checks.name: bseep_8es Step 9.1.1 stiffener-beam weld shear rupture

calculation_memory.equation: Fillet: Ru_w2_v2_vgizq = Fys_pest_vgizq * 0.6 * t_pest_vgizq * l_w2_vgizq; l_w2_vgizq = L_pest_vgizq - c_pest_vgizq - 2*w_w2_vgizq; phi*Rn_w2_v2_vgizq = phi * kds_w2_vgizq * nl_w2_vgizq * 0.6 * Fexx_w2_vgizq * 0.707 * l_w2_vgizq * w_w2_vgizq; DCR_w2_v2_vgizq = Ru_w2_v2_vgizq / phi*Rn_w2_v2_vgizq (AISC 360-22W J2b(g))

Ru_v2_vgizq = Vh_vgizq_max; Rn_v2_vgizq = 0.6 * Fy_vgizq * tw_vgizq * d_vgizq * Cv1; phi*Rn_v2_vgizq = phi * Rn_v2_vgizq; DCR_v2_vgizq = Ru_v2_vgizq / phi*Rn_v2_vgizq (AISC 360-22 G2.1, Eq. G2-3/G2-4; kv=5.34 for webs without transverse stiffeners)
